news.title: Two Men Drown While Bathing In Canal In UP: Cops
news.excerpt: Two men drowned while bathing in a canal on Friday after they apparently ventured into deep waters.

news.title: Enforcement Directorate Awards 2 Officers Who Were Part Of I-PAC Raids
news.excerpt: The raid was carried out at the I-PAC office in Salt Lake in January.

news.title: Repolling At 15 Booths In 2 West Bengal Constituencies Today
news.excerpt: Voting in all 15 polling stations will start at 7 am and end at 6 pm.

news.title: Deepfake Video Of Rajnath Singh Used To Promise Returns Of Rs 15 Lakh A Month
news.excerpt: The fact-check unit of the Press Information Bureau has also said the video is fake.

news.title: AAP Wins Confidence Motion In Punjab Assembly With Clear Majority
news.excerpt: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann emphasised that negative news and rumours are circulating.

news.title: 60-day prohibitory order in Kolkata's central business district from May 3
news.excerpt: The restrictions will remain in force from May 3 to July 1, 2026, or until further notice
